blocks.text: MacIntyre four clear at TPC San Antonio after 54 holes. Kristoffer Reitan's T7 (-6) is the Norwegian story — inside the top 10 heading into Sunday's final round at this Masters warm-up.
🎾 Sat 06:00 — Rolex Monte-Carlo Masters opens on clay. Ruud hunts Roland Garros form.
🚴 Sun 10:00 — Tour of Flanders. Seven Norwegians ride cycling's greatest cobbled Monument.

blocks.label: Big week incoming
items: 🎮 Mon 02:00 — PGL CS2 Major Bucharest opens. rain (Håvard Nygaard) leads Norwegian charge.
⚽ Tue 21:00 — Bayern Munich at Real Madrid, Champions League QF first leg
⚽ Tue 21:00 — Arsenal at Sporting CP, Champions League QF first leg
